name: Split Pea Soup-1
recipeIngredient: 1 Clove Garlic, minced -or- 1 t Garlic Powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Start early (at least 4-5 hours) so it can cook all day.
2. In a large soup kettle, cover peas with 2 quarts cold water.
3. Simmer for 2 minutes. Remove from heat and let stand.
4. Add all other ingredients.
5. Leave soup to simmer on low heat (do not boil), stirring occasionally, for 3-4 hours.
6. When peas are tender, use a blender to blend 1/3 to 1/2 of the soup.
7. Leave the rest of the soup as is.
8. Mix the blended and unblended parts together.
9. Taste and adjust seasonings if needed (e.g., add Italian spices, salt, and pepper).
